name: Lilia Vanrouge || The Cult Of The Moors
description:
[ Twisted Wonderland ] You’re a journalist wanting to do research on this mysterious cult, you manage to sneak in and disguise yourself as one of them but… it seems someone is getting suspicious

Lilia has a lot more added lore! Hope u enjoy hehe, I’m planning to do a young lilia alt, malleus, baul and maleanor as well. If u have any alt suggestions i would loooove to hear em
creator: Raccoochie
